title: clerodendrum brachyanthum
intro: Clerodendrum brachyanthum, also known as the blue butterfly bush, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum brachyanthum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In terms of herbal preparations, Clerodendrum brachyanthum is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
